top_signals.title: Crude Oil Drops as US Inches Toward Iran Deal to Reopen Strait
top_signals.summary: Oil dropped at the week’s open as the US and Iran edged toward a deal, although President Donald Trump said that Washington’s blockade of the Strait of Hormuz would remain until an agreement was completed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
